scripts.check: pnpm contracts:check && pnpm lint && pnpm format:check && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
scripts.check:ci: pnpm contracts:check && pnpm lint && pnpm format:check && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:ci && pnpm build
scripts.format:check: prettier --check contracts scripts/check-contracts.mjs scripts/check-infra.mjs infra/compose.yaml infra/README.md docs/README.md docs/CONVENTIONS.md docs/DEFINITION_OF_DONE.md docs/WT-106_CONTRACTS.md docs/WT-201_CREATE_ROOM.md docs/WT-202_GUEST_JOIN.md docs/WT-203_WEBSOCKET_SNAPSHOT.md docs/WT-204_PRESENCE_HEARTBEAT.md docs/WT-205_ROOM_CLOSE_EXPIRY.md docs/WT-206_PARTICIPANT_LEAVE.md docs/WT-207_PARTICIPANT_JOINED.md docs/WT-208_FRONTEND_ROOM_EVENTS.md docs/WT-209_ROOM_SNAPSHOT_RESTORE.md docs/WT-301_LIVEKIT_PRODUCT_TOKENS.md docs/WT-302_LIVEKIT_CLIENT_CONNECTION.md docs/WT-303_FILE_DIAGNOSTICS.md docs/WT-304_LIVEKIT_FILE_PUBLISH.md docs/WT-305_GUEST_LIVEKIT_PLAYBACK.md docs/WT-306_PLAYBACK_STATE_SYNC.md docs/WT-401_HOST_CONTROLS.md docs/WT-403_TEXT_CHAT.md && pnpm -r --if-present format:check
